theme.title: Color Theme
theme.description: Pygments style name (e.g. monokai, dracula, nord, github-dark, vs)

font_size.title: Font Size
font_size.description: CSS font-size for the code block (e.g. 0.88em, 14px)

line_height.title: Line Height
line_height.description: CSS line-height for the code block. 1.5–1.8 recommended.

tab_size.title: Tab Size
tab_size.description: Number of spaces a tab character is expanded to.
